message:
chore(models): bump default_claude to opus-4-7 and default_codex to gpt-5.5-codex

Refreshes the generated-config defaults emitted by the installer so newly
provisioned machines land on the currently-shipping flagship models:

- default_claude: claude-opus-4-5-20251101 -> claude-opus-4-7
- default_codex:  gpt-5.2-codex            -> gpt-5.5-codex

gemini default (gemini-3-pro-preview) is unchanged — still current.

This only affects the seed written by the installer; existing installations
keep whatever they already resolved. Follows the pattern of previous model
bumps in this section of the installer.

files.patch:
@@ -5746,8 +5746,8 @@ projects_base = "/data/projects"
 
 [models]
 # Default models when no specifier given
-default_claude = "claude-opus-4-5-20251101"
-default_codex = "gpt-5.2-codex"
+default_claude = "claude-opus-4-7"
+default_codex = "gpt-5.5-codex"
 default_gemini = "gemini-3-pro-preview"
 
 [agents]
